entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT FROM NOON TODAY TO 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

entry.data:
SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 90
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CALM WINDS, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
